summary_en: 2,800,000 shares (3.93% of S/O) to be cancelled effective 2026-05-29. Post-cancellation issued shares: 68,530,850; treasury shares: 3,424,404.
title_en: Notice of Cancellation of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: MIXI resolved on 2026-05-15 by board decision, under Company Law Article 178, to cancel 2,800,000 treasury shares of common stock representing 3.93% of issued shares outstanding. The cancellation is scheduled for effective date 2026-05-29. Following completion, issued share count will be 68,530,850 and treasury shares will number 3,424,404.
